name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the use case or limitation that motivates this request. -->
<!-- "As a [type of user], I want [capability] so that [benefit]." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why didn't they work for you? -->

## Constraints check

<!-- Del-Fi has hard constraints. Please confirm this feature respects them: -->

- [ ] Does not require internet connectivity at runtime (offline-first)
- [ ] Responses still pass through the formatter and respect the 230-byte LoRa limit
- [ ] Does not cause the LLM to answer from training knowledge instead of local context

## Deployment context

<!-- Optional: what oracle type are you running? (observatory, community hub, emergency, etc.) -->
<!-- What hardware? Any relevant mesh topology details? -->
